positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a mountain range silhouette viewed at dawn. The mountains should be depicted with clean, crisp lines and varying degrees of complex texture (like pine forests or rock formations). The foreground features a single, majestic stylized cabin or tent silhouette. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo and black for the silhouettes, contrasted against a gradient sky of soft peach, pale yellow, and light teal. The style should be modern graphic design with a vintage poster feel, emphasizing strong composition and negative space. Perfect for apparel printing, vector quality, clean edges, centered focus.
negative: blur, smudge, text, watermark, logo, gradient noise, low detail, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, busy background, realistic photo, 3d render, signature
